title: Mellow Ground
description: Mellow Ground subtly transforms the vanilla dirt path block by giving it a richer, warm brown color and a refined, detailed texture.
body:
Tired of the pale, washed-out yellow dirt path? Mellow Ground is a simple resource pack that brings warmth and richness back to your trails. It replaces the vanilla path block texture with a more detailed, natural design, crucially changing its color from harsh yellow to a deep, satisfying brown. Perfect for builders who crave a softer, more aesthetically pleasing look that truly grounds their world. Give your walkways a relaxed and 'mellow' upgrade!

![An image showing the before and after of the dirt path.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59cba9da84cf8cf2ef68b81af50057f5d7661b81.jpeg)
